name: Insight Digital Partners II
business: Insight Digital Partners II is a blank check company formed to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has no operations and has generated no revenue to date.

exposures.sentence: We may pursue an initial Business Combination in any business or industry but we expect to target opportunities and companies that are in high-growth, high impact sectors that form the backbone of the digital economy including Payment Gateways, Stablecoin, Exchanges, Crypto Miners, Crypto Holding and Trading, High Performance Computing, Energy, and Crypto Treasury Strategy.
